steps.title: Explain the accuracy gap
steps.content: The text says Alvarez's 2015 calculation was more accurate than the 1920 US Geological Survey calculation. The next sentence explains why that older calculation was less precise: it used only cardboard and string.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A signals similarity, B signals pursuit of a goal, and D signals a final outcome. The equipment detail is instead an unsurprising explanation for why the earlier calculation was less accurate. The answer is C.
